title: Stacy Dickson
compiled_truth: Stacy Dickson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-13), Stacy Dickson sent 410 and received 1397 emails, totalling 1807 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gregg Penman](people/gregg-penman) (76), [Mark Breese](people/mark-breese) (42), [Ellen Wallumrod](people/ellen-wallumrod) (26), [Dan Hyvl](people/dan-hyvl) (24), [Cary Carrabine](people/cary-carrabine) (22).
